title: Constraint Evidence
description: Schema for evidence collected during constraint evaluation.

evidence_id.description: Unique identifier for this evidence record.

rule_id.description: The constraint rule this evidence applies to.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when evidence was collected.

key.description: Evidence field name matching required_evidence in constraint object.

value.description: The evidence value. Can be string, number, boolean, or object.

source.description: Origin of this evidence (kernel name, reference ID, etc.).

verified.description: Whether this evidence has been verified against its source.

completeness.description: Whether all required evidence was collected.

missing_items.description: List of required evidence items that could not be collected.
